name: Ember Spirit
description: Balance in all things. Xin, the Ember Spirit This page is about the hero Ember Spirit.

abilities.name: Immolation
abilities.description: The higher Xin's level, the greater the damage per second value.

abilities.name: Searing Chains
abilities.description: Unleashes fiery bolas that wrap around nearby enemies, anchoring them in place and dealing damage each second.

abilities.name: Sleight of Fist
abilities.description: The Sleight of Fist is more effective and deals more damage on enemy heroes.

abilities.name: Flame Guard
abilities.description: Surrounds himself with a ring of fire that consumes incoming magic damage, absorbing a percentage of the damage taken.

abilities.name: Activate Fire Remnant
abilities.description: Dashes out to all active Fire Remnants, destroying them and dealing damage in an area, and then moving to the next nearest Remnant.
